path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(27, 161, 226), rgb(25, 140, 196)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 110, 175), rgb(81, 175, 231));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 24px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
